name: NORMA Group SE Namens-Aktien o.
summary: NORMA Group SE is a global market leader in engineered joining technology, providing solutions for a wide range of industries including water management, automotive, and industrial applications. The company develops and manufactures connecting, retaining, and fluid handling products with headquarters located in Maintal, Germany. Its business model focuses on providing high-quality, customized solutions to meet specific customer needs, backed by strong engineering expertise and global manufacturing capabilities.
